title: Foundation & Global Setup
summary: Update `app/layout.tsx` with Polish SEO metadata, semantic layout tags, and custom fonts. Set up global Tailwind configuration with a warm, pet-friendly color scheme.
acceptanceCriteria: The root layout has an `html` tag with `lang="pl"`.
SEO title is set to 'Schronisko Ciepła Buda' with an appropriate description in Polish.
Tailwind theme includes warm colors appropriate for the shelter branding.
A standard sans-serif font is configured.

title: Base UI Components
summary: Create or generate the fundamental UI components needed across the application using standard React patterns or shadcn/ui.
acceptanceCriteria: A reusable `Button` component exists and supports various variants (e.g., solid, outline).
A reusable `Card` component exists for wrapping content.
Form components (`Input`, `Textarea`, `Label`) are available and styled.

title: Data Mocking & Types
summary: Define the TypeScript type for `Animal` and mock a centralized data module `lib/data.ts` containing animals, contact details, and navigation links.
acceptanceCriteria: An `Animal` type is exported with properties: `id`, `name`, `type`, `age`, `breed`, `description`, and `imageUrl`.
An array of at least 3 featured animals is exported.
Shelter contact information (address, phone, email, opening hours) is exported.
Navigation links data structure is exported.

title: Global Layout Components
summary: Implement the `Header` and `Footer` components and integrate them into the global layout.
acceptanceCriteria: The `Header` displays the shelter name/logo and desktop navigation links.
The `Header` includes a working mobile hamburger menu (Client Component).
The `Footer` displays a contact summary, social links, and copyright info.
Both components are responsive and integrated into `app/layout.tsx`.

title: Hero and About Sections
summary: Build the `Hero` section and the `About` section.
acceptanceCriteria: The `Hero` section renders the 'Schronisko Ciepła Buda' title, a tagline, and primary CTAs ('Adoptuj', 'Wesprzyj') with anchor links.
The `About` section displays the shelter's mission and history with placeholder text.
Both sections are fully responsive on mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports.

title: Adoption Gallery Section
summary: Implement the 'Do adopcji' section using the mocked animal data to render a responsive gallery grid.
acceptanceCriteria: The section iterates over the mocked animals from `lib/data.ts`.
Each animal is displayed in a `Card` showing its photo, name, age, breed/type, and description.
Animal images are loaded quickly (using `next/image` with proper alt text).
The gallery grid is responsive and works well on all screen sizes.

title: How to Help and Contact Sections
summary: Build the 'Jak pomóc' section detailing support methods and the 'Kontakt' section containing contact information, a map, and a contact form.
acceptanceCriteria: The 'How to Help' section lists donation, material gifts, volunteering, and virtual adoption options.
The 'Contact' section displays address, phone, email, and opening hours from `lib/data.ts`.
A visual contact form (Name, Email, Message, Submit) is present and functional (UI only, prevents default on submit).
A map placeholder or embedded map is visible in the Contact section.
Form inputs have proper associated labels for accessibility.

title: Page Assembly, Polish, & Verification
summary: Assemble all sections sequentially into `app/page.tsx`, ensure smooth scrolling navigation, verify accessibility, and guarantee responsive layout without horizontal scroll issues.
acceptanceCriteria: `app/page.tsx` sequentially renders the Hero, About, Adoption, HowToHelp, and Contact sections.
Navigation links in the Header correctly scroll to the respective section IDs.
No horizontal scrolling occurs on mobile devices.
All images have meaningful `alt` attributes.
The application passes basic accessibility checks and achieves fast LCP for the Hero section.
